dimensions.statement: The organisation has a clearly articulated strategy linked to business objectives.
Leadership has defined where to focus investment and manage risk.
There is a prioritised roadmap outlining near-term and long-term initiatives.
The organisation has defined success metrics beyond experimentation.
The organisation has a clear operating model with defined roles and responsibilities.
There are established processes for moving from pilot to production.
The organisation has mechanisms to coordinate efforts across teams.
Roles and responsibilities for development, deployment, and ownership are clear.
The organisation actively builds capability appropriate to different roles.
Staff have access to practical training, tools, and guidance.
The organisation can attract, develop, or access the technical talent required.
There are clear pathways for employees to propose, test, and refine ideas.
